task_updates.executor_notes: Removed `MEMBER_SYSTEM_PROMPT` and `MEMBER_MAX_CONVERSATION_LENGTH` from `src/features/admin_chat/agent.py`, switched the import at `src/features/admin_chat/agent.py:15` from `get_tools_for_role` to `TOOLS`, simplified `_trim_conversation` at `src/features/admin_chat/agent.py:202-227` to always use `ADMIN_MAX_CONVERSATION_LENGTH`, and dropped the `is_admin` parameter from `AdminChatAgent.chat()` at `src/features/admin_chat/agent.py:229-236`. Inside `chat()`, `available_tools` is now always `TOOLS`, the system prompt is always `SYSTEM_PROMPT` with the existing server-config override preserved, `_POM_ADDENDUM` is always appended, `_ADMIN_IDENTITY_INJECTED_TOOLS` injection is preserved without the old `is_admin` guard, and `execute_tool(...)` now always receives `requester_id=None` as required. Updated the single cog call site at `src/features/admin_chat/admin_chat_cog.py:1200-1206` to drop `is_admin=True` while keeping `requester_id=None`. Verification: `rg -n "MEMBER_SYSTEM_PROMPT|MEMBER_MAX_CONVERSATION_LENGTH|get_tools_for_role|is_admin|requester_id=None if is_admin|_trim_conversation\(" src/features/admin_chat/agent.py src/features/admin_chat/admin_chat_cog.py` showed only the expected non-agent `_is_admin` references in `admin_chat_cog.py`; `pytest tests/test_admin_payments.py --tb=no -q --no-header` passed with `50 passed, 1 warning`; `pytest --tb=no -q --no-header` passed with `200 passed, 4 warnings`.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Confirmed. In `src/features/admin_chat/agent.py`, `MEMBER_SYSTEM_PROMPT`, `MEMBER_MAX_CONVERSATION_LENGTH`, the `is_admin` parameter on both `chat()` and `_trim_conversation()`, and every `if is_admin` branch were removed. The import switched from `get_tools_for_role` to `TOOLS`, `_ADMIN_IDENTITY_INJECTED_TOOLS` injection was preserved with the guard collapsed, and the cog call site in `src/features/admin_chat/admin_chat_cog.py:1200-1206` now drops `is_admin=True` while keeping `requester_id=None`.
